## Plugin Name
Name from your `plugin.yaml`.

## Plugin Type
- [ ] Asset Adapter
- [ ] Sensor Adapter
- [ ] Mission Pack
- [ ] Planner Plugin
- [ ] Analytics Plugin
- [ ] Transport Plugin

## Description
What does this plugin do?

## Domain
- [ ] Air
- [ ] Ground
- [ ] Maritime
- [ ] Space
- [ ] Cyber
- [ ] Multi-domain

## Dependencies
List any external dependencies beyond `amos-core`.

## Testing
How has this plugin been tested? (Simulator, hardware-in-the-loop, etc.)
